title.en: IOC says Infantino complaint outside its scope
title.zh-CN: 国际奥委会表示Infantino投诉超出其范围

summary.en: The IOC says it will not investigate Gianni Infantino as a complaint about the Fifa president is "outside" its scope.
summary.zh-CN: 国际奥委会表示不会调查Gianni Infantino ，因为关于国际足联主席的投诉“超出了”其范围。

title.en: Senegal appeal date set after Afcon win overturned
title.zh-CN: 在Afcon获胜后设定的塞内加尔上诉日期被推翻

summary.en: The Court of Arbitration for Sport sets a date for a hearing over Senegal's appeal against being stripped of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations title.
summary.zh-CN: 体育仲裁法院设定了对塞内加尔就被剥夺2025年非洲国家杯冠军头衔提出的上诉进行听证的日期。

title.en: What's working - and what's not - for WSL fans?
title.zh-CN: 什么对WSL球迷有效，什么对WSL球迷无效？

summary.en: BBC Sport spoke to fans of the Women's Super League and England Lionesses to learn about their experiences in the game and discuss what could be improved.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台采访了女子超级联赛和英格兰女狮队的球迷，了解他们在比赛中的经历，并讨论有待改进的地方。

title.en: Devlin opens up on 'too stressful' Hearts exit for Rangers
title.zh-CN: Devlin为流浪者队打开了“压力太大”的心脏出口

summary.en: Cammy Devlin says it was "too stressful" to head to the World Cup with his club future still to be decided - although the extra time taken did lead to a move to Rangers.
summary.zh-CN: 卡米·德夫林（ Cammy Devlin ）表示，在俱乐部的未来仍有待决定的情况下，前往世界杯“压力太大” -尽管所花费的额外时间确实导致了转会到流浪者队。

title.en: 'Celtic close on Hogh' as Maeda & Danilo near exits - gossip
title.zh-CN: 「凯尔特人靠近Hogh」， Maeda和Danilo靠近出口-流言蜚语

summary.en: Bodo/Glimt's Kasper Hogh is reportedly close to joining Celtic with Daizen Maeda poised to complete his switch to Ipswich Town and Rangers' Danilo pictured arriving in Brazil to complete a loan move.
summary.zh-CN: 据报道， Bodo/Glimt的Kasper Hogh即将加入凯尔特人队， Daizen Maeda准备完成对Ipswich Town的转换，而Rangers的Danilo则抵达巴西完成贷款搬迁。

title.en: 'I'll walk away!' Klopp sends warning to critics after Germany appointment
title.zh-CN: （我要走了！ “克洛普在德国任命后向批评者发出警告

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp has warned he will walk away from his new job as Germany's head coach if the German media don't "leave my family in peace".
summary.zh-CN: 尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）警告说，如果德国媒体不“让我的家人安静下来” ，他将辞去德国主教练的新工作。

title.en: Liverpool takeover Q&A: Could Bezos buy stake at Anfield?
title.zh-CN: 利物浦收购问答：贝索斯能否收购安菲尔德的股份？

summary.en: Liverpool's owners Fenway Sports Group are in talks with a consortium fronted by Amit Bhatia over the sale of a minority stake in the club.
summary.zh-CN: 利物浦的所有者芬威体育集团正在与阿米特·巴蒂亚（ Amit Bhatia ）领导的一个财团就出售该俱乐部的少数股权进行谈判。

title.en: Could Adeyemi's Barcelona move see Flick unlock winger's true potential?

title.en: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
title.zh-CN: 40岁的莫德里奇与AC米兰签订新协议

summary.en: AC Milan midfielder Luka Modric - who turns 41 in September - signs a one-year contract extension at the club.
